investigation_conclusion.finding: v6 seed=42000. Seed variance ~10pp at iter20. Training peaks at iter20 (PFSP echo chamber). Practical ceiling ~0.427.
investigation_conclusion.do_not_run: More vN PPO experiments without fundamentally new intervention

pivot1_mcts_selfplay.config: n-sim=50, dir-alpha=0.3, dir-epsilon=0.25, nash-temperatures, 500g each side

v14_post_mortem.root_cause: BC warm-start from heuristic-only data too weak. GNN PPO v14 started at ~0.192 vs v56 PPO warm-start starting at ~0.441. PPO can't recover 25pp in 20 iters.
v14_post_mortem.lesson: For new architectures, BC warm-start MUST use data from a strong learned model, not just heuristic games.
v14_post_mortem.value_mse_root_cause: BC v1 value_mse=0.77 (near-random). v13 game data in BC v2 already showing value_mse=0.58 at epoch4.

v15_plan.status: COMPLETE 2026-04-20 FAILED. combined=0.112 (USSR=0.196, US=0.028). GNN approach FAILED. formal bench iter10=0.112 (panel best).
v15_plan.bc_v2_killed: Mixed data contamination (0.77→0.80 value_mse). Killed at epoch 15.
v15_plan.bc_v3_status: RUNNING. Pure v13 3000g data. 80 epochs. Val_card_top1=0.686@ep12. Val_value_mse=0.81 (worsening - overfitting). BC v3 ep12 bench: combined=0.140 (gate FAIL at 0.20).
v15_plan.bc_v3_root_cause: winner_side target is too noisy for learned-model games. Value head memorizes train set (mse=0.09-0.17) but fails on val (mse=0.81+). Card accuracy improving but US side weak (0.040).
v15_plan.teacher_targets_ready: data/teacher_targets/v13_3000g_soft_teacher.parquet (334K rows, SOFT card/mode/value from v13_iter20 model forward pass. Card=111-dim softmax, mode=6-dim softmax, value=tanh[-1,1])
v15_plan.bc_v4_plan: If BC v3 fails gate: auto-launch BC v4 with --teacher-targets v13_3000g_soft_teacher.parquet + teacher-weight=0.5 + teacher-value-weight=1.0. Soft distillation from v13 should improve both policy and value quality.
v15_plan.monitor: /tmp/watch_bc_v3.sh auto-handles: gate check -> BC v4 fallback -> PPO v15
v15_plan.ppo_launch: results/launch_gnn_ppo_v15.sh (monitor will auto-fire from BC v3 or BC v4)
v15_plan.gate: 100g/side bench. combined >= 0.20 to launch PPO v15.

formal_bench.conclusion: FAIL. v13 baseline (0.427) not beaten. GNN BC warm-start approach exhausted.

v15_post_mortem.result: FAILED combined=0.112 @ iter80 best (iter10 running_best). GNN BC→PPO approach exhausted.
v15_post_mortem.root_cause: 33pp warm-start gap (GNN BC=0.11 vs country_attn v56 warm-start=0.441) never recovered by PPO. PFSP echo chamber prevents recovery.
v15_post_mortem.lesson: GNN architecture needs a different warm-start path (weight transfer from v13 or direct MCTS distillation). BC→PPO pipeline broken for new archs when warm-start <0.20.
v15_post_mortem.do_not_run: More GNN BC→PPO attempts without weight transfer or fundamentally different warm-start.

v9_v12_summary.status: COMPLETE 2026-04-20. All failed to beat v13.
v9_v12_summary.lesson: 30-game panel SE=0.091 produces false positives. Always confirm with 100g+ formal bench.

key_lessons.bc_warmstart_quality: BC warm-start quality = bottleneck for new architectures. v14 (heuristic BC) = 0.192. Always use games from best learned model for BC warm-start. v13 selfplay → BC → GNN PPO is the right sequence.
key_lessons.mcts_collection_speed: collect_mcts_games_jsonl with n-sim=1 (direct policy, batched) is ~100x faster than collect_selfplay_rows_jsonl for learned models (batch vs sequential inference).
key_lessons.panel_unreliability: 30-game panel SE≈0.091. Never use as sole running_best selector. Always bench 500g/side.
key_lessons.pfsp_echo_chamber: PFSP peaks at iter20. External fixtures starved even with heuristic-floor=0.15.
key_lessons.seed_matters: PPO ~10pp seed variance at iter20. Always use seed=42000.
key_lessons.teacher_distillation: ACTIVE for BC v4. Use data/teacher_targets/v13_3000g_teacher.parquet (mcts_root_value = v13 value head predictions). teacher_value_weight=1.0 to maximize value signal. BC v3 confirmed: winner_side alone insufficient (val_value_mse=0.81 overfitting).

pivot3_mcts_distillation.approach: Fine-tune country_attn_side (v13_iter20) with MCTS visit-count soft targets from data/selfplay_mcts_dir/mcts_dir_1000g.parquet (105K rows, 50 sim each). Use visit counts as better policy targets than raw model predictions.

plan.step1: Generate soft MCTS teacher targets: normalize visit counts to policy distribution
plan.step2: BC v5: fine-tune v13_iter20 with MCTS soft targets (teacher_weight=0.7, teacher_value_weight=1.0, epochs=30, lr=2e-4)
plan.step3: PPO v16: warm-start from BC v5 checkpoint, same hyperparams as v15 but starting at ~0.427+
plan.gate: BC v5 must reach combined >= 0.40 (100g/side) to proceed to PPO v16

pivot3_mcts_distillation.rationale: v13 already at 0.427. MCTS visit counts (50 sims) provide better calibrated policy signal. Fine-tuning (not cold-start) should preserve v13 quality while improving on key positions.

gate_result.root_cause: MCTS game state distribution != heuristic opponent distribution. 40 epochs fine-tune on MCTS data caused catastrophic forgetting of heuristic-opponent strategies.

pivot3_mcts_distillation.lesson: MCTS data fine-tuning destroys heuristic WR. MCTS positions (AI-vs-AI) have different state distribution than heuristic opponent games. Never fine-tune exclusively on MCTS data without mixing heuristic-opponent games.

pivot4_league_redesign.hypothesis: PFSP echo chamber causes training to peak at iter20. All PPO runs v6-v15 hit ceiling ~0.30-0.43. Need to break echo chamber.
pivot4_league_redesign.approach: Resume v13 PPO past iter20 with: (a) heuristic-floor=0.40 (higher than current 0.15), (b) fixture-only league (no PFSP), (c) lower entropy to preserve heuristic game quality
pivot4_league_redesign.alternative_a: Run PPO v16 from v13 with league_fixture_fadeout=0 (fixtures never fade) and heuristic-floor=0.50
pivot4_league_redesign.alternative_b: Pure heuristic training: eval-panel only, no PFSP pool at all
pivot4_league_redesign.gate: Must show iter30+ panel >= 0.450 to continue (vs v13 which peaked at iter20)

seed_sweep.rationale: v6 (seed=42000, same warmstart) = 0.459 project record. Seed variance ~10pp. Best of 3 new seeds expected ~0.45+. All runs stop at iter20 before PFSP echo chamber.

v16_result.root_cause: dir_alpha=0.3/dir_epsilon=0.25 at PPO rollout level (no MCTS) = 25% random moves. AlphaZero Dirichlet is for MCTS root node (averaged over 800 sims). Applied to raw policy rollouts it destroys trajectory quality.
v16_result.lesson: NEVER apply full AlphaZero Dirichlet (dir_epsilon=0.25) to PPO rollouts without MCTS. Designed for search, not direct sampling.

v17_plan.approach: Exact v13 recipe (seed=42000, v56 warmstart) + ONLY panel_heuristic_weight=3.0. Isolate panel fix. No Dirichlet, no temperature change.
v17_plan.hypothesis: The panel fix (3x heuristic weight) prevents echo-chamber false positives. With correct running_best selection, training may continue improving past iter20.

v17_result.conclusion: FAIL vs v13 (0.427). Root cause: PFSP variance — v13 was high seed roll. Panel_heuristic_weight=3.0 correctly slows degradation (5.4pp drop iter20→40 vs 17pp for v13). Absolute floor unchanged.
v17_result.lesson: Seed variance dominates. Same recipe gives 0.31-0.43 at iter20. Need seed sweep to find high rolls.

v18_seed_sweep.conclusion: Best-of-3 = 0.407. Mean ~0.387. seed=42000 (v17) was low roll at 0.314. Distribution ~0.37-0.41. Still below v13 (0.427) which was a high roll.

v19_result.conclusion: FAIL. Panel false positives: panel=0.479 at iter30 but bench=0.299. Panel SE=9.1% (30 games) too noisy.
v19_result.lesson: Panel-guided running_best unreliable at 30 games. All v56-warmstart runs 0.30-0.41 peak.

v20_plan.hypothesis: Starting from 0.427 prevents early degradation; panel fix may maintain or improve

v22_result.conclusion: NEW RECORD 0.466. Bug fix (remove us_win_w loss-weighting) + no UPGO fixed US degradation. Model improves iter10->40 for first time.

v24_progress.note: Still running. Likely to improve further.
